ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Player's username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Player's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for player authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time the player last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Player's country */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Player's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Player's gender */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Player's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Player's biography */,
  "language" TEXT /* Player's preferred language */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Player's timezone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the game */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game */,
  "platforms" TEXT /* Platforms the game is available on */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the game (e.g., E, M, AO) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the mode belongs to */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of players required for the mode */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the mode in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "kits" (
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kit */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the kit belongs to */,
  "kit_name" TEXT /* Name of the kit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kit */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the kit */,
  "speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the kit */,
  "damage" INTEGER /* Damage dealt by the kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_kit_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-kit statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kit */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills achieved by the player */,
  "kpm" REAL /* Kills per minute */,
  "time_played" TEXT /* Total time played in the format 'hh:mm' */,
  "spm" REAL /* Score per minute */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the statistics were last updated */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins with the kit */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses with the kit */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws with the kit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_kit_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_kit_stats_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES kits ("kit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kit */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the session in the format 'hh:mm' */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved during the session */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills achieved during the session */,
  "kpm" REAL /* Kills per minute during the session */,
  "spm" REAL /* Score per minute during the session */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES kits ("kit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "kit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the kit */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player on the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills of the player */,
  "kpm" REAL /* Kills per minute of the player */,
  "spm" REAL /* Score per minute of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the player */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the player */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_kit_id FOREIGN KEY ("kit_id") REFERENCES kits ("kit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., bug, suggestion, complaint) */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or bug report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was resolved */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the support team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support ticket */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., account, gameplay, technical) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the ticket (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the support staff who resolved the ticket */,
  "resolved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ticket was resolved */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments from the support team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES support_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_support_tickets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "support_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the support staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the support staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the support staff member (e.g., support, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the support staff member belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the support staff member (e.g., active, on leave) */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the support staff member (e.g., technical, account) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "patch_notes" TEXT /* Patch notes for the version */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Download link for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the player (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the player's review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_reviews_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "achieved_at" TEXT /* Date and time the achievement was achieved */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for achieving the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friend relationship */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "friend_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend player */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friend relationship (e.g., accepted, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friend relationship was created */,
  "friend_since" TEXT /* Date the players became friends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_friends_friend_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_friends_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_bans" (
  "ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ban */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban (e.g., cheating, harassment) */,
  "ban_start" TEXT /* Start date and time of the ban */,
  "ban_end" TEXT /* End date and time of the ban */,
  "banned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who issued the ban */,
  "ban_reason_text" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the ban */,
  "appeal_status" TEXT /* Status of the appeal (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bans_banned_by FOREIGN KEY ("banned_by") REFERENCES support_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bans_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_bans_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., purchase, exchange) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the transaction */,
  "transaction_time" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction occurred */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, canceled) */,
  "item_purchased" TEXT /* Item purchased or exchanged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_transactions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_referrals" (
  "referral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the referral */,
  "referred_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who was referred */,
  "referral_date" TEXT /* Date the referral was made */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for the referral */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_referrals_referred_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("referred_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_referrals_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who received the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., experience points, in-game currency) */,
  "reward_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date the reward was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rewards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
